chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI M.A. Nos.20 and 21 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objection a/w reply ast at A & B 2.For hg of main case 05.08.2024. Mr. Khurrum Gul Ghory, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Salim Gulam Husein, advocate for respondent No. 2. These Misc. Appeals have been filed under section 117 of the Trademarks Ordinance, 2001 against an order 26.10.2023, whereby application of appellant for registration was refused/dismissed on objection of respondent No. 1 by respondent No.2, the Registrar of Trademarks. Learned counsel appearing for Registrar of Trademarks Respondent No.2 submits that this decision was made in October, 2023, yet the reasons have not been issued by the Registrar. Since despite best efforts, respondent No.1, which is located in USA has not been served, if the matter may be remanded back to respondent No. 2 for decision afresh on application of the appellant after hearing both the parties, he will have no objection. This proposal has been accepted by the appellant. In view of above, these appeals are disposed of in the terms whereby that respondent No. 2 shall re-consider the application of the appellant for registration and decide it afresh only after hearing the opposition from respondent No. 1. JUDGE HANIF
